content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "CAUTIOUS",
    "reasoning": "Nifty -0.94% breaking below 24,000 with VIX +8.37% to 18.25, broad weakness in Auto/Realty/PSU Bank/Energy. Defensive pockets working: IT (+0.27%), Pharma (+0.51%), FMCG strong (TATACONSUM +9%, MARICO +1.8%, DABUR +1.7%). Book is appropriately positioned with defensive holdings carrying the day; focus is on trailing winners (COFORGE, LAURUSLABS, MARICO, SUNPHARMA, APOLLOHOSP) rather than new entries into broad weakness.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 23845,
      "nifty_resistance": 24166
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "GOLDBEES -1.2%, in consolidation. SL 121 sits 2.1% below CMP 123.62 (within 1% trail-gap rule range). Holding as portfolio hedge given VIX +8% and macro uncertainty."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "MARICO",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 835.00,
      "new_target": 870.00,
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "MARICO +3.4% at INR 847, fresh 52-week high on Q4 beat + bullish FY27 guidance. Current SL 832 already locks profit. Trail SL slightly up to 835 (1.5% below CMP, respecting 1% trail-gap rule). Target intact at 870."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "COFORGE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1358.97,
      "new_target": 1500.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "COFORGE +9.9%, gapped up +7.8% on Q4 beat with PL Capital target Rs 2020. Current SL 1358.97 sits 1.9% below CMP 1384.20 — already a healthy trail and within 1% trail-gap floor. Leaving SL unchanged (no-op MODIFY avoided per rules — emitting HOLD-equivalent at current levels). Actually emit HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "SRF",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "SRF +0.2% at 2788. SL 2740 sits 1.7% below CMP — within 1% trail-gap floor. Q4 PAT +10.6%, FY26 +46.7%, refrigerant capex thesis intact. Hold for breakout above intraday high 2832."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "POLYCAB",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.60,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "POLYCAB -0.5% at 9050, made fresh 52w high 9136 intraday before fading. SL 8950 sits 1.1% below CMP — adequate trail-gap. Thesis intact (Q4 rev +27%, capital goods strength). Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "BAJAJ-AUTO",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.60,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "BAJAJ-AUTO -1.5% at 10599, Auto sector weak today -1.34%. SL 10440 sits 1.5% below CMP. Buyback at Rs 12000 record date May 29 provides floor. Thesis (buyback + dividend) intact. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "DABUR",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "DABUR -1.6% at 478. Q4 PAT +16%, India guidance raised to low-double-digit FY27. SL 468 sits 2.1% below CMP. Hold for thesis play-out."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "LAURUSLABS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1255.00,
      "new_target": 1320.00,
      "confidence": 0.72,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "LAURUSLABS +3.6% at 1270, fresh 52w high. Current SL 1255 already at +2.4% from entry — locks gain. SL 1255 sits 1.2% below CMP 1270 — within trail-gap floor. No-op on stored values — emit HOLD instead."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "TATACONSUM",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.68,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "TATACONSUM +0.6% at 1255, surged +9.18% intraday at 52w high on Q4 beat. SL 1198 sits 4.5% below CMP — wider trail acceptable for newly-broken-out name with momentum. Hold for run to target 1330."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "CGPOWER",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "CGPOWER -0.1% at 865, hit ATH 886.80 intraday. SL 850 sits 1.7% below CMP. Q4 print strong, order book +61%. Hold; will trail on next sustained advance."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "APOLLOHOSP",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.60,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "APOLLOHOSP -0.2% at 8085, near 52w high 8099. SL 7950 sits 1.7% below CMP. Q4 board meet May 20 — binary risk in 7 sessions (outside 3-session window). Hold for now; reassess closer to event."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "SUNPHARMA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "SUNPHARMA -0.1% at 1874, made fresh 52w high 1885 intraday on Pharma sector lead. SL 1830 sits 2.4% below CMP. Q4 earnings May 21 — outside 3-session binary window. Hold for momentum continuation."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "LALPATHLAB",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "LALPATHLAB -1.0% at 1653, faded from intraday high 1698. Research now flags BEARISH (-0.08) with Q4 PAT -15%, peer underperformance. SL 1610 sits 2.6% below CMP. Position is at -1.1%; thesis weaker than at entry but not broken. Hold to SL — do not pre-empt per Rule 17."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {"symbol": "GOLDBEES", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "Hedge position; SL adequate"},
    {"symbol": "MARICO", "current_action": "TRAIL_SL", "new_stop_loss": 835.00, "reasoning": "Trail SL up modestly to 835 (1.5% below CMP) on 52w high breakout"},
    {"symbol": "COFORGE", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "SL 1358.97 already 1.9% below CMP — adequate trail, no-op MODIFY avoided"},
    {"symbol": "SRF", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "Bullish chart, SL appropriate"},
    {"symbol": "POLYCAB", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "Intraday high faded, thesis intact"},
    {"symbol": "BAJAJ-AUTO", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "Auto weak but buyback floor at 12000 supportive"},
    {"symbol": "DABUR", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "FMCG momentum, thesis intact"},
    {"symbol": "LAURUSLABS", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "SL 1255 already locks gain; further tighten would breach 1% trail-gap floor"},
    {"symbol": "TATACONSUM", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "Wide SL preserved for momentum room post breakout"},
    {"symbol": "CGPOWER", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "ATH made today, monitor for sustained close"},
    {"symbol": "APOLLOHOSP", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "Q4 board May 20 (outside 3-session window); will trim closer to event"},
    {"symbol": "SUNPHARMA", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "Sector lead, 52w high"},
    {"symbol": "LALPATHLAB", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "Bearish research now (Q4 PAT -15%) but position only -1%; respect SL 1610 per Rule 17 — do not panic-exit"}
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "Reviewing afternoon BULLISH candidates per Rule 18: (1) BIOCON — research turned BEARISH (-0.10) on Q4 PAT -63% reported drop; PASS. (2) THERMAX/AFFLE — gap-up names in weak market, FOMO entries into VIX +8% spike; PASS. (3) INFY/HCLTECH — IT defensive but no fresh catalyst beyond INR weakness, already have COFORGE as IT exposure; PASS. (4) ASIANPAINT, APTUS, MCX — interesting catalysts but adding into NIFTY -0.94% / VIX +8.37% session is poor R:R; PASS. Existing pending TATACONSUM BUY at 1240 (placed 389m ago) is now ~1.2% below CMP 1255 — the position already filled separately at avg 1248; cancelling this stale duplicate.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Deployed 52% / cash 48%. Book is appropriately defensive-tilted for a high-VIX session (FMCG/Pharma/IT carrying the day). Today's unrealized +₹4,458 partially offsets earlier realized -₹28,429. Per Rule 18, I walked qualifying afternoon candidates explicitly — each rejected with stated reason (BIOCON bearish flip, others FOMO into VIX spike). Not adding into broad weakness today is justified by an explicit risk-off tape signal (VIX +8.37%, Nifty broke 24,000), not anchored conservatism. Will cancel stale HFCL pending order from prior session (placed 7734m / 5+ days ago — thesis stale).",
  "decisions_supplementary": [
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "HFCL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "note": "Cancel stale HFCL MIS BUY pending 5+ days — thesis stale, MIS order from prior session is invalid anyway"
    }
  ]
}
